allow: PowerShell("HEAD InputManager has requestPointerLock?:"; git show HEAD:src/core/InputManager.ts | Select-String -SimpleMatch "requestPointerLock" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; "exit/empty above = NOT in HEAD"; "---"; "hash of disk file:"; git hash-object "src/core/InputManager.ts"; "hash in index:"; git ls-files -s "src/core/InputManager.ts"; "---"; "last commit touching it:"; git log --oneline -1 -- src/core/InputManager.ts)
